MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-27-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALLIED MEDICAL SERVICES DBA KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND UNDER CCP 430.10(E). THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING TO MAINTAIN THIS ACTION UNDER CCP 367 BECAUSE SHE IS NOT THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST. PLAINTIFF COMPLAINS ABOUT AN INJURY TO MR. BAUMEL, BUT DOES NOT ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING HOW SHE IS HIS SUCCESSOR AND CAN MAINTAIN THIS ACTION. THE ALLEGED COMMON LAW MARRIAGE DOES NOT CREATE STANDING UNLESS PLAINTIFF CAN ALLEGE THAT THE COMMON LAW MARRIAGE WAS VALIDLY CONTRACTED IN ANOTHER STATE. SEE KNIGHT V. SUPERIOR COURT (2005) 128 CAL. APP. 4TH 14, 19. THE DURABLE POWER OF ATTORNEY DOES NOT CREATE STANDING. THE COURT REJECTS DEFENDANT'S STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ARGUMENT. THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT CLEARLY DISCLOSE THE DATE OF INJURY. WHILE DEFENDANT APPEARED AT THE PREMISES ON APRIL 27, 2011, IT IS UNCLEAR WHEN THE INJURY (I.E., MR. BAUMEL'S DEATH) OCCURRED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-04-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ernice Fagan, Plaintiff and Self-Represented Litigant, appeared;
Lindsay H. Sanders, Law Offices of Prindle Amaro Goetz Hillyard Barnes & Reinholtz, 415.788.8354, appearing for the Defendant Allied Medical Services.

Matter A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT ALLIED MEDICAL SERVICES DBA KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend under CCP 430.10(e). The complaint fails to state a cause of action. Plaintiff lacks standing to maintain this action under CCP 367 because she is not the real party in interest. Plaintiff complains about an injury to Mr. Baumel, but does not allege facts showing how she is his successor and can maintain this action. The alleged common law marriage does not create standing unless Plaintiff can allege that the common law marriage was validly contracted in another state. See Knight v. Superior Court (2005) 128 Cal. App. 4th 14, 19. The durable power of attorney does not create standing. The Court rejects defendant's statute of limitations argument. The complaint does not clearly disclose the date of injury. While defendant appeared at the premises on April 27, 2011, it is unclear when the injury (i.e., Mr. Baumel's death) occurred. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Sep-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lindsay Sanders, Esq. of Prindle Amaro Goetz Hillyard Barnes & Reinholtz, Tel. 562.436.39.46, for defendant and moving party by Court Call;
Ernice Fagan, Tel. 415.684.4504, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court granted plaintiff's request for additional time to file an opposition. DEFENDANT ALLIED MEDICAL SERVICES DBA KING AMERICAN AMBULANCES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to September 27, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Plaintiff's opposition is due on 9/17/13; Defendant may file a reply in accordance with statute. Parties are to provide the court with courtesy copies of the document(s) on the same day they are filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
